raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section stakes out a specific interface-contribution framing ('not a modeling contribution') and two 'first' positioning claims; the thesis and gap statement need reconstruction to verify internal coherence.","R1.2":"Causal leaps are present: the 22% reformulation reduction is attributed to the panel without confound discussion; the generalization argument to voice assistants and enterprise search has no logical scaffolding in the text.","R1.3":"Quantitative claims (22% reduction, 0.6 Likert points) carry no inferential statistics, confidence intervals, or effect-size framing; qualitative quotes are two cherry-picked exemplars; the 'foundational step' and 'first empirical demonstration' claims substantially outrun a 48-participant single-institution study.","R1.4":"Two strong 'first' novelty claims are asserted without a literature survey or nearest-prior-work comparison; relevant bodies of work on clarifying questions in search (e.g., Zamani et al.) and mixed-initiative IR are not cited or contrasted."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I check this for research-claim validity—covering evidence-claim alignment, logical consistency, and novelty against prior work—or primarily for writing quality and clarity?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section stakes out a specific interface-contribution framing ('not a modeling contribution') and two 'first' positioning claims; the thesis and gap statement need reconstruction to verify internal coherence.
rationale.R1.2: Causal leaps are present: the 22% reformulation reduction is attributed to the panel without confound discussion; the generalization argument to voice assistants and enterprise search has no logical scaffolding in the text.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative claims (22% reduction, 0.6 Likert points) carry no inferential statistics, confidence intervals, or effect-size framing; qualitative quotes are two cherry-picked exemplars; the 'foundational step' and 'first empirical demonstration' claims substantially outrun a 48-participant single-institution study.
rationale.R1.4: Two strong 'first' novelty claims are asserted without a literature survey or nearest-prior-work comparison; relevant bodies of work on clarifying questions in search (e.g., Zamani et al.) and mixed-initiative IR are not cited or contrasted.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I check this for research-claim validity—covering evidence-claim alignment, logical consistency, and novelty against prior work—or primarily for writing quality and clarity?
